title: coriaria terminalis
intro: Coriaria terminalis, also known as the New Zealand pepper tree or tree pepper, is a flowering plant native to the Pacific Islands and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Coriaria terminalis include relieving muscle and joint pain, reducing inflammation and swelling, and aiding in digestion. Coriaria terminalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible addition to natural health regimens.
